name: Pat O'Neil
bio: Pat O'Neill is an American stand-up comedian who rose to prominence through the live comedy podcast Kill Tony at the Comedy Mothership in Austin, Texas. He became the first comedian to be promoted from Kill Tony golden-ticket winner to full-time regular live on stage.

timeline.ev: Wins a Kill Tony golden ticket and is named a regular

accolades: First Kill Tony golden-ticket winner promoted to regular live on stage
